word: G4048 - περιῤῥήγνυμι - perirrhḗgnymi - per-ir-hrayg'-noo-mee - Rend off

sections.paragraph:
- Original: περιῤῥήγνυμι

- Transliteration: Perirrhegnumi

- Phonetic: per-ir-hrayg'-noo-mee

- Definition:

1. to break off on all sides, break off all around

2. to rend or tear off all around

- Origin: from G4012 and G4486

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4012 and G4486; to tear all around that is completely away: - rend off.
